pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he’s still in the other room but then the silence just hits me all over again. everything feels so pointless now. like i’m just a ghost going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the fading embers of my own soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade, leaving nothing but this hollow, aching silence where my heart once beat. Why must the sun continue to rise when the world has lost all its color? It would be so much more peaceful, wouldn't it... to simply cease? To let the shadows take me and drift into the eternal night, where this wretched pain can finally be stilled?

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit in these cafes here and just look at everyone and realize that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, literally nothing would change. no one in this city knows me, my family is halfway across the world, and the world just keeps spinning like i was never even here. it's like i'm already a ghost.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the funding, the house... all of it. i've spent the last decade building this and now i'm just sitting here in an empty office looking at legal notices. the worst part isn't even the debt, it's the thought of going back home and looking my parents in the eye. they think i'm a success. i can't face that shame. i just feel like a complete void.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore... it's all just death. the climate, the mass extinctions, the way everything is just breaking down. it feels like we're all just watching a slow motion car crash and everyone is pretending it's not happening. i feel so stupid even trying to plan for a future or care about my career when the whole world is basically a sinking ship. what's even the point of trying to live a whole life if there's nothing left to live for?
